name: Portfolio Advisor for VMware Departure
description: Automatically build a roadmap for migrating applications from VMware virtual machines to an optimal deployment on the cloud and identify the recommended path.

segments.name: Cloud-based VM
segments.description: A recommendation to move the application to a cloud-based virtual machine using Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS).

segments.name: Containerize
segments.description: A recommendation to perform modest modifications of the application code without changing the architecture or functionality so that it can be deployed on the cloud in a container using Container as a Service (CaaS) or using Platform as a Service (PaaS).

segments.name: Rearchitect
segments.description: A recommendation to dramatically modify the application code thereby altering the architecture to improve the health of the application and enable it to be deployed in the cloud using Platform as a Service (PaaS) or deployed serverless using Function as a Service (FaaS).

segments.name: Rebuild
segments.description: A recommendation to discard the code of the application and develop it again in the cloud using Platform as a Service (PaaS) or serverless using Function as a Service (FaaS).

segments.name: Retire
segments.description: A recommendation to discard the application altogether or potentially replace it with a commercial Software as a Service (SaaS) alternative.

name: Portfolio Advisor for Cloud
description: Dramatically speed up the time for developing a cloud migration portfolio roadmap with automatic recommendations on how to segment applications into different migration categories such as: Rehost, Refactor, Retire, etc. CAST Highlight includes the innovative Portfolio Advisor for Cloud, a dedicated portfolio-level report that automatically recommends migration segments for each application.

segments.name: Rehost
segments.description: A recommendation to change the infrastructure configuration of the application in order to “Lift & Shift” it to the cloud using Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS).

segments.name: Refactor
segments.description: A recommendation to perform modest modifications of the application code without changing the architecture or functionality so that it can be migrated to the cloud in a container using Container as a Service (CaaS) or using Platform as a Service (PaaS).

matchingRules.description: Current state is not full Cloud

segments.name: Rearchitect
segments.description: A recommendation to dramatically modify the application code thereby altering the architecture to improve the health of the application and enable it to be migrated to the cloud using Platform as a Service (PaaS) or deployed serverless using Function as a Service (FaaS).

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and CloudScan =is= notnull
Current state is not full Cloud

segments.name: Rebuild
segments.description: A recommendation to discard the code of the application and develop it again in the cloud using Platform as a Service (PaaS) or serverless using Function as a Service (FaaS).

segments.name: Retire
segments.description: A recommendation to discard the application altogether or potentially replace it with a commercial Software as a Service (SaaS) alternative.

name: Portfolio Advisor for Open Source
description: The CAST Highlight Portfolio Advisor for Open Source is a dedicated portfolio-level report that automatically recommends priority actions for each application. Rapidly prioritize the applications with Open Source components that should be remediated based on the application context and get automatic recommendations that identify the actions to take such as: Fix Vulnerabilities, Upgrade Components, Evaluate Legal Risk, etc.

segments.name: Immediate Attention
segments.description: Critical applications with mutliple types of 3rd party component risk (security, legal, operational).

segments.name: Fix Vulnerabilities
segments.description: Critical applications with severe security vulnerabilities.

segments.name: Evaluate Legal Risk
segments.description: Critical applications with risky 3rd party component licenses.

segments.name: Upgrade Components
segments.description: Critical applications with out of date 3rd party components.

segments.name: Consider Alternate Components
segments.description: Less impactful applications with one or more 3rd party component risks.

segments.name: Role Models
segments.description: Applications that are using safer 3rd party components.

matchingRules.formula: OSS > 95 and OSS < 100 and OSS =is= notnull

name: Portfolio Advisor for Technical Debt
description: Identify and prioritize Technical Debt mitigation effort across your portfolio, whether it comes from the code, obsolete technologies, or aging third-party OSS components. Note: For optimal results, ensure you submitted the Business Impact survey and used recent versions of CAST Highlight to scan applications.

segments.name: Top Priorities (Bad Debt)
segments.description: Business-critical applications with severely high tech debt

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and High TechDebt density or High BI and Low Obsolescence or High BI and deprecated technologies
matchingRules.formula: BI >= 50 and TechDebtDensity >= 1 and OSS_obsolescence < 50 and (appData < '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData < '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData <= '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}')

segments.name: Low Software Health
segments.description: Business-critical applications with resiliency, agility, complexity issues.

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and low Software Health

segments.name: Obsolete Technology Versions
segments.description: Business-critical applications with old versions of technologies.

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and Obsolete technology versions
matchingRules.formula: BI >= 50 and (appData < '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData < '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData <= '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}')

segments.name: Outdated Open Source
segments.description: Business-critical applications with old versions of open-source components.

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and low Obsolescence score

segments.name: Acceptable (Good Debt)
segments.description: Less business-critical applications with low tech debt.

matchingRules.description: Low Business Impact, Low Tech Debt Density, Low Obsolescence, Up-to-date technologies
matchingRules.formula: BI < 50 and BI >= 0 and TechDebtDensity > 0 and TechDebtDensity < 1 and OSS_obsolescence > 50 and (appData >= '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData >= '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData > '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData > '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData >= '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData >= '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData > '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}')

name: Portfolio Advisor for Software Maintenance
description: Optimize costs across your application portfolio with this dedicated portfolio-level report that automatically recommends software maintenance actions. Instantly identify opportunities to optimize development resource allocation, improve team skills, reduce turnover, and gather deeper software intelligence insights.

segments.name: Invest Resources
segments.description: Business critical applications that would benefit from more development resources (according to the COCOMO II model recommended maintenance effort).

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and Recorded Maintenance effort lower than Recommended Maintenance effort

segments.name: Reallocate Resources
segments.description: Less business critical applications that are healthy and may have more development resources than necessary (according to the COCOMO II model recommended maintenance effort).

matchingRules.description: Low Business Impact, High Software Health, Recommended Maintenance effort lower than Recorded Maintenance effort
matchingRules.formula: BI < 33 and Health > 75 and MaintenanceRecorded > val_MaintenanceRecommended

segments.name: Develop Team Skills
segments.description: Applications with lower Software Health and Open Source Safety scores where team members have less experience.

matchingRules.description: Low/Mid Software Health and Open Source Safety, Skill level < 1 year

segments.name: Reduce Turnover
segments.description: Business critical applications with development teams experiencing a high turnover rate, representing significant future risk.

segments.name: Get Deeper Software Intelligence
segments.description: Business critical applications with high complexity that require deeper insights using CAST Imaging to centralize application knowledge and better understand software interactions.

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact, High complexity, Turnover > 25%, low/medium skills
matchingRules.formula: BI > 75 and Elegance < 54 and (QUESTION_REF_CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER =in= (CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER:30PCT,CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER:25PCT) or QUESTION_REF_CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL =in= (CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL:LESS2MONTH,CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL:6MONTH,CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL:1YEAR))

segments.name: Role Models
segments.description: Applications with high Software Health, high Open Source Safety, and appropriate allocation of resources (according to the COCOMO II model recommended maintenance effort).

matchingRules.description: High Software Health, High Open Source Safety, Recommended Maintenance lower than Recorded Maintenance
matchingRules.formula: Health > 74 and OSS > 83 and MaintenanceRecorded > val_MaintenanceRecommended and (QUESTION_REF_CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL =in= (CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL:3YEARS,CAST_MAINT_DEVSKILL:6YEARS) or QUESTION_REF_CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER =in= (CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER:3PCT,CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER:5PCT,CAST_MAINT_TURNOVER:10PCT))

name: Portfolio Advisor for Obsolete Technologies
description: Identify applications and prioritize technology upgrades to supported versions.

segments.name: Update First
segments.description: Business-critical applications with obsolete technology versions (e.g., Java, .NET, Spring Boot).

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and obsolete technology versions
matchingRules.formula: BI >= 50 and (appData < '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData < '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData <= '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}')

segments.name: Update Next
segments.description: Less critical applications with obsolete technology versions.

matchingRules.description: Low Business Impact and obsolete technology versions
matchingRules.formula: BI < 50 and (appData < '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData < '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData <= '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData < '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData <= '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}')

segments.name: Up-To-Date
segments.description: Applications using recent technology versions.

matchingRules.formula: appData >= '{"name": "JDK", "version":"17"}' or appData >= '{"name": "Springboot", "version":"3.3"}' or appData > '{"name": ".NET", "version":"7"}' or appData > '{"name": ".NET core", "version":"3.1"}' or appData >= '{"name": ".NET standard", "version":"2.0"}' or appData >= '{"name": ".NET framework", "version":"999"}' or appData > '{"name": "ASP.NET", "version":"4.7.2"}'

name: Cloud Migration Wave Advisor
description: This dashboard recommends the sequence of applications to migrate to the cloud for optimal results. Recommendations are based on various insights such as the Business Impact of applications, Cloud Maturity score, estimated effort, and segment (rehost, refactor, rearchitect, etc.) as well as detected technologies. Note that the  applications in the Retire segment from the Portfolio Advisor for Cloud are NOT included in the Wave recommendations. For optimal recommendations, the Business Impact and Cloud Maturity surveys should be completed.

segments.name: Wave 1 - Quick Wins
segments.description: Migrate now with minimal effort and risk.

matchingRules.description: Low Business Impact and High Cloud maturity and Low Cloud Effort. Not in Rebuild, Rearchitect or Retire segments.     (10pts)
matchingRules.formula: BI =is= notnull and BI <= 50 and CloudScan =is= notnull and CloudMaturity > 50 and ((FTE <= 0 and CloudEstEffort < 'Math(5*60*8)') or (FTE > 0 and CloudEstEffort < 'Math(0.25*60*8*17.5*QUESTION_REF_CAST_BI_FTE)')) and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg1, Cloud5R_Seg2)

matchingRules.description: Low Business Impact and High Cloud maturity and Low Cloud Effort in Rearchitect segment.     (5pts)
matchingRules.formula: BI =is= notnull and BI <= 50 and CloudScan =is= notnull and CloudMaturity > 50 and ((FTE <= 0 and CloudEstEffort < 'Math(5*60*8)') or (FTE > 0 and CloudEstEffort < 'Math(0.25*60*8*17.5*QUESTION_REF_CAST_BI_FTE)')) and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg3)

matchingRules.description: Standalone application (no other applications depending on it). Not in Retire segment.     (3pts)
No dependency (the current application doesn't depend on other applications). Not in Retire segment.     (3pts)

segments.name: Wave 2 - Core Cloud
segments.description: Migrate next while also modernizing.

matchingRules.description: High Business Impact and High Cloud Maturity or High Cloud Maturity and Low Business Impact and High Cloud Effort. Not in Rebuild or Retire segments.     (10pts)
matchingRules.formula: Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg1, Cloud5R_Seg2, Cloud5R_Seg3) and ((BI =is= notnull and BI > 50 and CloudMaturity =is= notnull and CloudMaturity > 50 ) or (BI =is= notnull and BI <= 50 and CloudScan =is= notnull and CloudMaturity > 50 and ((FTE <= 0 and CloudEstEffort >= 'Math(5*60*8)') or (FTE > 0 and CloudEstEffort >= 'Math(0.25*60*8*17.5*QUESTION_REF_CAST_BI_FTE)'))))

segments.name: Wave 3 - Long Term Bets
segments.description: Migrate and then modernize later.

matchingRules.description: Low Cloud Maturity score or applications in Rebuild with High Cloud Maturity and High Business Impact. Not in Retire segment.     (10pts)
matchingRules.formula: (CloudMaturity =is= notnull and CloudMaturity <= 50 and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg1, Cloud5R_Seg2, Cloud5R_Seg3)) or (CloudMaturity =is= notnull and CloudMaturity > 50 and BI =is= notnull and BI > 50 and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg4) )

segments.name: Wave 4 - Pursue Later
segments.description: Modernize first and then migrate.

matchingRules.description: Applications in Rebuild with Low Business Impact or Low Cloud Maturity or Mainframe-SAP systems or applications not using a cloud compatible database. Not in Retire segment.     (20pts)
matchingRules.formula: (((CloudMaturity =is= notnull and CloudMaturity <= 50) or (BI =is= notnull and BI <= 50)) and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg4) ) or (technologies =in= (ASSEMBLY, COBOL, JCL, CICS, IMS, ABAP, PL1, DB2, CLIST, EGL, Easytrieve, RPG3, RPG4) or QUESTION_REF_CAST_CLOUD_DATAMODEL =in= (CAST_CLOUD_DATAMODEL:NOT_COMPATIBLE) and Segment:Cloud5R =in= (Cloud5R_Seg1, Cloud5R_Seg2, Cloud5R_Seg3, Cloud5R_Seg4))

segments.name: More assessment needed
segments.description: No Business Impact nor Cloud Maturity.

matchingRules.description: No Business Impact or no Cloud Maturity score and not a Mainframe-SAP systems. Not in Retire segment.    (15pts)
matchingRules.formula: (BI =is= null or CloudMaturity =is= null) and Segment:Cloud5R =out= (Cloud5R_Seg5)

name: Portfolio Advisor for Green
description: The CAST Highlight Portfolio Advisor for Green is a dedicated portfolio-level report that automatically identifies opportunities to improve sustainability and Green Impact of applications across your portfolio. Rapidly prioritize the applications that should be remediated based on the application context and get automatic recommendations that identify Quick Wins, Longer Term Opportunities, and Role Models to use when planning your sustainability initiatives.

segments.name: Quick Wins
segments.description: Applications that represent the best opportunity to improve your Green Impact score with the least amount of effort.

segments.name: Rising Stars
segments.description: Business critical applications that will require more effort to improve the Green Impact score but will be strategic for the organization for the foreseeable future.

segments.name: Role Models
segments.description: Applications that are already using environmentally friendly coding practices.

segments.name: Long-Term Investments
segments.description: Applications that have a low Green Impact score and will require significant effort to improve, but will have a strong payoff in the long run.
